title: Freshworks revamps ITAM in Freshservice with AI and live discovery
description: Freshworks has completely revamped IT Asset Management in Freshservice. Continuous discovery, live dependency mapping, and AI-driven analysis are now integrated into a single platform. With this, the company aims to extract infrastructure data from isolated silos and link it directly to service workflows. Infrastructure data remains fragmented across separate tools. Discovery tools and Configuration Management [...]

title: Smart AI Dialysis System Launched at KC General Hospital: Karnataka Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao
description: Karnataka Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao launched an AI-based dialysis monitoring system at KC General Hospital in Bengaluru. The system aims to improve patient safety, ensure real-time monitoring, and enhance treatment quality under the PPP model.

title: My two Raspberry Pi boards cost as much as a laptop now - and AI is to blame
description: We live in a time when two 16GB Raspberry Pi 5 boards cost the same as a MacBook Neo. Here's why - and how to save.
